builds.name: Arcadia
builds.address: Campeau Dr & Arcadia Pkwy, Kanata, ON
builds.description: Premium urban lifestyle community in Kanata North with a diverse range of home types. Parkside at Arcadia now open with quick-move-in homes for first-time buyers.

builds.name: Brookline
builds.address: Palladium Dr & Huntmar Dr, Kanata, ON
builds.description: Master-planned community next to Kanata's technology sector. Phase 2 with select single-family homes remaining.

builds.name: Abbott's Run
builds.address: 380 Huntmar Drive, Kanata, ON
builds.description: Progressive community on Hazeldean Rd with a future LRT stop. One of Minto's largest and most diverse collections with quick occupancy homes available.

builds.name: Northwoods
builds.address: 1020 March Road, Ottawa, ON
builds.description: 1,000+ home development surrounded by Old Quarry Trail and South March Highlands Conservation Forest. ENERGY STAR certified homes. ~240 homes in Phase 1.

builds.name: Blackstone
builds.address: Fernbank Rd & Eagleson Rd, Kanata, ON
builds.description: 341-unit community with bungalows, townhomes, and single-family homes. Only 1 home remaining. Sizes 1,611–2,660 sq ft.

builds.name: EdenWylde
builds.address: Fernbank Rd & Shea Rd, Stittsville, ON
builds.description: 500+ home community in Stittsville. Phase 2 now open. Townhomes feature finished basements, quartz countertops, and stainless steel appliances included.

builds.name: Kanata Lakes
builds.address: 1215 Tamworth Lane, Kanata, Ottawa, ON

builds.name: Kanata Lakes — The Pond
builds.address: Walden Drive Extension, Kanata, ON
builds.description: Phase 1 'The Pond' launched with ~500 units. Located just north of Beaver Pond, extending Walden Drive into Kanata Lakes master-planned community.

builds.name: Union West
builds.address: 6147 Fernbank Road, Ottawa, ON
builds.description: ~100 lots in Fernbank community on 30' and 36' lots. New sales centre and model home open. Features quartz countertops, 9' smooth ceilings on main floor, finished basements.

builds.name: Westwood
builds.address: Hazeldean Rd & Westwood Dr, Stittsville, ON
builds.description: Modern community on the edge of Stittsville. Multi-builder project with Claridge Homes and Richcraft Homes. Townhomes, singles, and bungalows available.

builds.name: Wateridge Village
builds.address: 750 Aviation Pkwy, Ottawa, ON
builds.description: Single-family homes, semis, and townhouses in a master-planned community near the Ottawa River and former Rockcliffe Airbase.

builds.name: Central Park
builds.address: Strandherd Dr & Greenbank Rd, Barrhaven, ON
builds.description: Established Barrhaven community with schools, parks, and transit nearby. Quick-move-in homes available.

builds.name: Half Moon Bay
builds.address: Greenbank Rd & Jockvale Rd, Barrhaven, ON
builds.description: Family-friendly community in Barrhaven South near the Jock River. Connected to Half Moon Bay Park and planned community amenities.

builds.name: Findlay Creek Village
builds.address: Limebank Rd & Earl Armstrong Rd, Ottawa, ON
builds.description: Established southeast Ottawa community with trails, parks, and local shopping. Phase 6 now selling.

builds.name: Avalon West
builds.address: Tenth Line Rd & Innes Rd, Orléans, ON
builds.description: Growing community in east Ottawa near the existing Avalon neighbourhood. Future LRT connectivity planned. ENERGY STAR certified.

builds.name: TrailsEdge
builds.address: Renaud Road & Page Road, Orléans, ON
